channel.title: Folktaler Fiction
channel.description: Curated learning content as audio plus slides.
channel.itunes:author: Folktaler
channel.itunes:summary: Curated learning content as audio plus slides.

item.title: Why Exponential Growth Looks Like Cheating
item.itunes:subtitle: Why compounding curves outrun our straight-line intuition — and how to spot exponential dynamics everywhere.
item.itunes:summary: Why compounding curves outrun our straight-line intuition — and how to spot exponential dynamics everywhere.
item.description:
Exponential growth feels like cheating because our brains are wired for straight lines, not compounding curves. This episode unpacks why a quantity that doubles again and again outruns intuition — and how to spot exponential dynamics in money, technology, populations, and learning.

In this episode:

  • Linear vs. exponential — why the difference sneaks up on you
  • The power of doubling and the rule of 72
  • Why early exponential growth looks deceptively slow
  • Real-world examples: compounding, viral spread, and scaling systems
  • How to train your intuition to respect the curve
item.content:encoded:
Exponential growth feels like cheating because our brains are wired for straight lines, not compounding curves. This episode unpacks why a quantity that doubles again and again outruns intuition — and how to spot exponential dynamics in money, technology, populations, and learning.

In this episode:

  • Linear vs. exponential — why the difference sneaks up on you
  • The power of doubling and the rule of 72
  • Why early exponential growth looks deceptively slow
  • Real-world examples: compounding, viral spread, and scaling systems
  • How to train your intuition to respect the curve
